abilities.name: Academic Superiority
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" ignore all text on the front of their crew card.

abilities.name: Chatty
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must each discard a card to declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Disarming
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 2 if the attacker did not declare a trigger.

actions.name: Gruesome Lecture
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Remains marker within 3" to add +(c) to its Skl.

triggers.name: Study Opponent
triggers.text: This model gains either a Focused or Shielded token.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Administrative Review
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models. Remove up to one token on the target. Then, have it gain a non-Summon token listed on this model's crew card.

triggers.name: "B...Minus"
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to the target and remove up to one marker within 2" of it.

actions.name: Academic Broadcast
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Up to two other friendly models within range move up to 3", then declare the Prepare action.

triggers.name: University Radio
triggers.text: When resolving, this action affects all friendly models within range.

actions.name: Careful Study
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Remains or Scheme marker. Draw a card, then remove the target.
